Name: Percentage of cases where 'Payment Handled' occurs after 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' out of all cases ending with 'Payment Handled'
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Frequency of 'Payment Handled' in variants that include at least one rejection activity (e.g., 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER') compared to variants without any rejection
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' executions that are preceded by 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' anywhere in the case
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Number of 'Payment Handled' events that occur in cases where 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' appeared earlier in the trace
Metric: Number of 'Payment Handled' activities for cases where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' occurs

Name: Percentage of total activity executions that correspond to 'Payment Handled'
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Payment Handled' in successful end-to-end reimbursement paths (i.e., variants ending with 'Payment Handled') versus all variants
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of cases containing 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' that eventually reach 'Payment Handled'
Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' out of all 'Payment Handled'

Name: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' cases that follow the shortest approval path (i.e., 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' → 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' → 'Request Payment' → 'Payment Handled')
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Ratio of 'Payment Handled' frequency in variants involving 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' versus those involving 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Percentage of all 'Payment Handled' instances that occur in cases never encountering any rejection activity
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all cases where 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' does not happen

Name: Frequency of 'Payment Handled' in cases where the only approvers involved are ADMINISTRATION and SUPERVISOR, excluding PRE_APPROVER involvement
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all cases where 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' does not happen

Name: Percentage of variants ending with 'Payment Handled' that contain zero occurrences of any 'Declaration REJECTED by ...' activity
Metric: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' out of all cases where 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' does not happen

Name: Number of 'Payment Handled' events associated with amounts above 100 euros in cases that previously included 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
Metric: Number of 'Payment Handled' activities > 100 where ma is the last value of case:Amount

Name: Percentage of 'Payment Handled' executions that are directly preceded by 'Request Payment' without any intervening rejection or resubmission loop
